summary: Privacy policy page displays required content and structure correctly but uses generic neutral palette instead of the required diner aesthetic. All functional requirements met including privacy sections, effective date, and navigation.

violations.description: Page uses generic neutral/gray background instead of required diner teal #9fd8d2 for public legal route canvas
Article card uses generic white/neutral background instead of required cream surface #fff8ea for legal content cards

actions: Apply diner teal background #9fd8d2 to main page canvas
Update article card to use cream surface #fff8ea instead of generic white
Ensure legal content maintains required diner palette consistency with public marketing routes
